_comment: First-party Oh The Biomes We've Gone MILLABLE-FLOWERS compat on the MEADOW family (feeds the create-otbwg-compat milling recipes — Step 3 of BWGPLAN, backlog #9). Throw a Meadow seed over a BWG floral grassland → a flower-field island whose ground cover is that biome's signature flowers, which are Create-millable into dyes/petals. Every flower block is a REAL BWG 2.6.0 block AND a create-otbwg-compat-1.0 milling INPUT (verified against both jars, 2026-07-01): the block resolves via Lookup.hasBlock, so an unknown id is silently skipped — inert without BWG (byte-identical generation) and safe if BWG's flora ids ever drift. Bands are PREPENDED (ThemeOverride.mergeBands) so they win the first-match over the base #is_meadow/#is_plains catch-alls (BWG floral biomes sit under those via #biomeswevegone tags). Ground flora is per-column (no tree tries), so the base/large/huge tier files share identical bands — a bigger island just grows proportionally more flowers.

biome_overrides._verify: verified: biome allium_shrubland; flowers from allium_shrubland_flowers (allium_flower_bush / pink_allium / white_allium / *_flower_bush / tall_allium*) — all millable
verified: biome amaranth_grassland; flowers from amaranth_grassland_flowers (amaranth + cyan/magenta/orange/purple) — all millable
verified: biome rose_fields; flowers from rose_field_flowers (rose / osiria_rose / blue_rose_bush) — all millable (rose_bush is not a milling input, so it is left out)
verified: biome coconino_meadow; alpine_bellflower + pink_daffodil + anemones (pink/white) + tulips — all millable
verified: biome orchard; lollipop_flower + white_allium + yellow_daffodil — all millable
verified: biome prairie; california_poppy is a dedicated placed feature here — millable
verified: biome temperate_grove; anemones (pink/white) + sages (blue/purple/white) — all millable
verified: biome firecracker_chaparral (dry); firecracker_flower_bush + california_poppy + a sage — all millable. Dry palette via a coarse_dirt scatter + dead bush.
